goal: Load the soul calculator only when the user opens it, instead of during the first page load.
expectedEffect: The home page loads fewer scripts on first open.
The soul calculator still loads its data before rendering.
cleanup: Repaired broken legacy strings in js/core/app-core.js so the file passes JavaScript syntax validation after the lazy-load change.
Kept legacy training fallback simple because the active jiangshen tools are loaded through the lazy jiangshen groups.
